name: Orange Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Crust:
1. Combine soft wholewheat bread crumbs, bran, brown sugar substitutes, and ground cinnamon in a bowl.
2. Rub butter into the mixture until it is crumbly.
3. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 7-8 inch springform pan.
Filling:
1. Unflavored gelatin (1 package)
2. Water
3. Cottage cheese
4. Orange juice
5. Orange rind
6. Banana
7. Brown sugar substitutes
8. Lemon juice
9. Orange
10. Strawberries or grapes
Combine the gelatin and water in a small saucepan, let stand for about 5 minutes to soften.
Place over low heat, stirring until the gelatin dissolves.
Let cool to room temperature.
In a food processor or blender, combine cottage cheese, orange juice, banana, sweetener, lemon juice, and dissolved gelatin. Puree until smooth.
Pour the mixture over the prepared crust. Cover and chill for 2-4 hours or until set.
At serving time, remove the side from the pan. Using a wide metal lifter, slip the cheesecake off the bottom of the springform pan onto a serving plate or leave it on the base of the pan.
Peel the orange, removing the pith and thin membrane. Remove sections.
Slice strawberries or grapes.
Arrange on top of the cheesecake along with orange slices.
Exchanges: 1/8 cheesecake: 1 Fruits & Vegetables Choice; 1 Protein Choice; 12 g carbohydrate; 10 g protein; 4 g fat; 124 calories
